zh.Burton Constable, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾伯頓 康斯特勃
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Constable IV於大約1265年出生在英國越可爾哈爾善姆時，他的父親Simon le Constable32歲，母親Katherine Cumberworth25歲。他於1304年4月23日之前與Avice Lascelles在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1337年1月9日之前在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.Burton Constable, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾伯頓 康斯特勃
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Constable IV于大约1265年出生在英国越可爾哈爾善姆时，他的父亲Simon le Constable32岁，母亲Katherine Cumberworth25岁。他于1304年4月23日之前与Avice Lascelles在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1337年1月9日之前在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Constable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name for the law-enforcement officer of a parish, from Middle English, Old French conestable, cunestable, from Late Latin comes stabuli ‘officer of the stable’. The title was also borne by various other officials during the Middle Ages, including the chief officer of a household or court, or a military officer, and this may in some cases be the source of the surname.
Americanized form of Dutch Constapel, an occupational name for the chief gunner aboard a ship or in the garrison of a fort.

variants.name: Costabile
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Ciro, Nino, Agnese, Angelo, Duilio, Enrico, Ercole, Franco, Palma.
occupational name from medieval Greek kontostablēs ‘chamberlain’, from medieval Latin comes stabuli, literally ‘count of the stable’ (see Constable ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Constable IV was born about 1265, in Halsham, Yorkshire, England, his father, Simon le Constable, was 32 and his mother, Katherine Cumberworth, was 25. He married Avice Lascelles before 23 April 1304, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 9 January 1337, in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Constable IV est né environ 1265, à Halsham, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Simon le Constable, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Katherine Cumberworth, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Avice Lascelles avant 23 avril 1304, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 9 janvier 1337, à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Constable IV um 1265 in Halsham, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon le Constable 32 und seine Mutter Katherine Cumberworth 25. Er hat vor 23. April 1304 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Avice Lascelles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 9. Januar 1337 in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Constable IV è nato il circa 1265 nel Halsham, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Simon le Constable, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Cumberworth, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Avice Lascelles prima del 23 aprile 1304, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 9 gennaio 1337, nel Yorkshire, England.

ja.Halsham, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアハルシャム
ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Burton Constable, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアブルトン コンスタブル
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Constable IVが約1265年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハルシャムで生まれた時，父Simon le Constableは32歳，母Katherine Cumberworthは25歳であった。1304年4月23日以前にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでAvice Lascellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1337年1月9日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Constable IV(이)가 대략 1265년 영국 요르크실르 할샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon le Constable(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Cumberworth(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1304년 4월 23일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Avice Lascelles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1337년 1월 9일 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1265–before 9 January 1337: ойролцоогоор 1265 он–1337 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 9–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Constable IV nasceu aproximadamente 1265, em Halsham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon le Constable, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Cumberworth, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Avice Lascelles antes 23 de abril de 1304, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 9 de janeiro de 1337, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Constable IV родился около 1265 г. в местности холшам, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Simon le Constable было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Cumberworth, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Avice Lascelles перед 23 апрель 1304 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 9 январь 1337 г. в местности еркшир, Англия.

sm.about 1265–before 9 January 1337: e tusa o le 1265–a'e le'I oo le 9 Ianuari 1337

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Constable IV nació aproximadamente 1265, en Halsham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Simon le Constable, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Katherine Cumberworth, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Avice Lascelles antes de 23 de abril de 1304, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 9 de enero de 1337, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
